health_conditions: CIRS (chronic inflammatory response syndrome / mold illness)

benefits.description: Raises MSH (melanocyte-stimulating hormone) levels, used therapeutically for CIRS/mold illness

side_effects.description: Extreme tanning after nearly 3 years of use; naturally olive-skinned but now dramatically darker

protocol_notes: Has been taking MT2 for almost 3 years for CIRS to raise MSH. Advises staying out of sun, using sunscreen, microdosing at night, and cycling off for 1-2 weeks to reduce tanning.
